description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: test and check. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions from 3.9 to 3.13, installing dependencies, running tox with various environments, and uploading coverage to Codecov. The check job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python version 3.12 and tox jobs for mypy, docs, linters, and twinecheck.
